text:
## Team Context
**Your assigned name**: spec-developer-metadata
**Team Lead**: team-lead (use SendMessage to reach me)
**Protocol**: QUESTION / BLOCKER / DONE / SUGGESTION via SendMessage
**Context Strategy**: repomix (all context pre-loaded below)
**Escalation rule**: Do NOT work silently on ambiguity. Ask first.

## Task
**Beads ID**: ui-kit-v4m
**Title**: Register all remaining components in metadata registry

Add ALL remaining components from core and inputs packages to the metadata registry at:
`/Users/zeizel/projects/ui-kit/packages/@rkr-react/core/src/core/styles-api/metadata.registry.ts`

## CRITICAL RULES
- ALWAYS use `-f` flags for cp/mv/rm operations
- Use absolute paths for all file operations
- Do NOT push or commit
- This is an Nx monorepo at `/Users/zeizel/projects/ui-kit`

## Current State
Currently only 6 components are registered: Button, Badge, Card, Modal, Input, Accordion.

## Metadata Schema (from metadata.types.ts)
```typescript
interface ComponentPart {
  name: string;         // Part name as used in stylesNames (e.g., 'root', 'inner', 'label')
  selector: string;     // data-part selector value (e.g., 'button-root')
  description: string;  // Human-readable description
}

interface ComponentToken {
  name: string;         // CSS variable name (e.g., '--button-bg')
  defaultValue: string; // Default value of the token
  description: string;  // Human-readable description
}

interface ComponentMetadata {
  name: string;         // Component name (e.g., 'Button')
  displayName: string;  // Display name for the UI
  description: string;  // Brief description
  parts: ComponentPart[];
  tokens: ComponentToken[];
}
```

## Components to Register

### Core Components (at `/Users/zeizel/projects/ui-kit/packages/@rkr-react/core/src/components/`)
Already registered: Button, Badge, Card, Modal, Input, Accordion

Need to register:
- Alert, AlertDialog, Avatar, Breadcrumbs, CloseButton, Code, Collapsible, CommandMenu, Container, ContextMenu, Divider, Drawer, Empty, Fieldset, Flex, Grid, Image, KBD, Link, Loader, Menu, Meter, NavigationMenu, Pagination, Paper, Popover, PreviewCard, Progress, Rating, ResizeLayout, ScrollArea, Skeleton, Slider, Steps, Tabs, Tag, Timeline, ToggleGroup, Toolbar, Tooltip, Transition, Typography, UnstyledButton

### Input Components (at `/Users/zeizel/projects/ui-kit/packages/@rkr-react/inputs/src/components/`)
- Autocomplete, BaseInput, Checkbox, ColorPicker, Combobox, DatePicker, FileInput, InputField, MaskInput, Multiselect, NumberInput, OTPInput, PasswordInput, PhoneInput, Radio, RangeInput, Select, Switch, Textarea, TimePicker

## How to Determine Parts and Tokens

For EACH component, you need to read its source code to find:

1. **Parts**: Look for `data-part` attributes in the TSX, OR look for the `stylesNames` type export, OR look at the CSS module file for class names
   - Pattern: `data-part="{component}-{part}"` 
   - The selector follows pattern: `{kebab-case-component}-{part-name}`
   
2. **Tokens**: Look for CSS variables in the component's CSS module file (`.module.css`) or in the `createVarsResolver` function
   - Pattern: `--{component}-{property}` 
   - Look at `varsResolver` functions for component-specific variables

3. **Description**: Brief one-line description of what the component does

## Strategy for Efficiency

Given the large number of components, use this approach:
1. Read each component directory - look for the main `.tsx` file and `.module.css` file
2. Use `Grep` to find `data-part` attributes and CSS variables (`--`) in the CSS module
3. Register with what you find. If a component has minimal styling (like Container, Flex, Grid), it may have few or no tokens - that's fine, register it with what it has
4. For simple wrapper components (Portal, Transition, UnstyledButton) with no visible UI parts, you can skip them or register with just a root part

## Existing Example (follow this pattern exactly)
```typescript
registerComponentMetadata({
  name: 'Accordion',
  displayName: 'Accordion',
  description: 'Collapsible content sections',
  parts: [
    { name: 'root', selector: 'accordion-root', description: 'Root accordion container' },
    { name: 'item', selector: 'accordion-item', description: 'Individual accordion item' },
    { name: 'control', selector: 'accordion-control', description: 'Clickable header/control' },
    { name: 'label', selector: 'accordion-label', description: 'Header label text' },
    { name: 'icon', selector: 'accordion-icon', description: 'Expand/collapse icon' },
    { name: 'panel', selector: 'accordion-panel', description: 'Collapsible content panel' },
    { name: 'content', selector: 'accordion-content', description: 'Inner content wrapper' },
  ],
  tokens: [
    { name: '--accordion-radius', defaultValue: 'var(--radius-sm)', description: 'Border radius' },
  ],
});
```

## File to Edit
`/Users/zeizel/projects/ui-kit/packages/@rkr-react/core/src/core/styles-api/metadata.registry.ts`

Add all new `registerComponentMetadata()` calls after the existing 6 entries. Keep the file organized with comments grouping core components and input components.

## Deliverables
1. All core and input components registered in metadata.registry.ts with accurate parts and tokens
2. DONE message with count of components added and summary
